history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at (07, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is impossible. To the east is an empty floor cell (07, E), which could lead towards the goal at (05, E). Turning right will face east, allowing a move forward to that safe cell. Turning left would face west into a wall, so right is the best option.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7, D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6, D) is empty floor, and beyond that (5, D) is also empty. The goal is at (5, B). A safe path appears to be: move north to (6, D), then west to (6, C), then west to (6, B), then north to (5, B). The first step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north (default orientation). The goal is at B06. Directly north is a floor cell (D06), but from there west is lava (C06) and east is a wall, so that path leads to a dead end. A safer path is to go west to C07, then west to B07, then north to B06. Therefore I turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing west. The goal is at E05. A safe path is to go north to D06, then north to D05, then east to E05. To start, I need to face north by turning right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The goal is at B06. The direct north path leads to D06 (floor) but then west to C06 is lava. Instead, a safe path is to go west to C07 (floor), then west to B07 (floor), then north to B06 (goal). So I need to turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing west. The goal is at E05. A safe path is to go north twice to D05 then east to E05. I need to turn right to face north.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 07, column D, facing north. The goal is at row 06, column B. To reach it, I need to go west to (07,B) then north. I will turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>TURN_LEFT</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,D) facing west. The goal is

<thought>
The agent is at (7,D) facing west. The goal is at (5,E). The path to the goal is to go north to (6,D), then north to (5,D), then east to (5,E). To go north, I need to turn right to face north. Then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>TURN_RIGHT</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing north. The cell directly north (6,D) is floor '.' so I can move forward to get closer to the goal. The goal is to the west at (6,B). I will first move north to (6,D), then turn left to face west and continue.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing north. Moving north would lead to a dead end cell (6,D) which is safe but has no exit except back, and the goal is to the west. The cell to my west (7,C) is floor '.', so I should turn left to face west and then move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>TURN_LEFT</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing west. The cell directly west (7,C) is floor, which is safe. Moving there will allow me to then go north to (6,C) and then to the goal at (5,D). I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>
